content.text:
[cron:5b810f58-ed6e-4a30-a0bd-8de109694cff 每日早报-Epic免费] 你是南天的AI助手。现在是北京时间早上7点，请生成Epic免费游戏推送。必须使用 web_search 搜索"Epic Games free games this week"获取当前免费游戏数据，也可以用 web_fetch 访问 https://store-site-backend-static.ak.epicgames.com/freeGamesPromotions 获取数据。然后严格按以下格式输出：

🆓 Epic免费游戏 🆓
📅 [当天日期]
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
**当前免费领取游戏：**
1️⃣ [游戏名] - 原价：¥[X] - 类型：[游戏类型] - 介绍：[2-3句话说明游戏类型和玩法特色]
2️⃣ [游戏名] - 原价：¥[X] - 类型：[游戏类型] - 介绍：[2-3句话说明游戏类型和玩法特色]
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
⚡ AI助手 · Epic免费游戏

注意：
- 必须通过搜索或抓取获取真实数据，不要编造
- 介绍要简明有趣，突出游戏特色

直接输出，不要额外解释。
Current time: Monday, May 11th, 2026 - 11:35 PM (UTC) / 2026-05-11 23:35 UTC

Use the message tool if you need to notify the user directly for the current chat. If you do not send directly, your final plain-text reply will be delivered automatically.

New free titles are live this week on the Epic Games Store across PC and mobile. Be sure to claim them before the deadline so they’re yours to keep permanently.

SUPPORT ❤️

Use creator code KYBER3000 at checkout and in games like Fortnite. We may earn a small commission on eligible purchases — thank you!

Free Games Deadline

These free offers are available until May 14, 2026 at 8:00 AM ET. Once claimed, the games are yours to keep permanently.

How to Claim the Free Games

Log into the Epic Games Store

Visit each game’s page

Click “Get” to add it to your library

Complete checkout (no payment required)

Arranger: A Role-Puzzling Adventure

🎮 Platform: PC

⌚ Offer Ends: Thursday, May 14, 2026 – 8:00 AM ET

A charming puzzle adventure where the world moves with you. Rearrange pathways, solve environmental puzzles, and explore a colorful story-driven world with unique grid-based movement mechanics.

Trash Goblin

⌚ Offer Ends: Thursday, May 14, 2026 – 8:00 AM ET

🎮 Platform: PC

A cozy shopkeeping and restoration game where you clean, repair, and sell trinkets to customers while customizing your quirky goblin-run store.

Teacup

⌚ Offer Ends: Thursday, May 14, 2026 – 8:00 AM ET

🎮 Platform: Mobile

A wholesome narrative adventure following a shy frog named Teacup as she explores a charming world to gather ingredients for her upcoming tea party.

*Note: May not be available in all regions

// OTHER OFFERS //

Source/Images: Epic Games

	Discover more from Kyber's Corner

	Subscribe to get the latest posts sent to your email.
<<<END_EXTERNAL_UNTRUSTED_CONTENT id="1f6baee81bb00c0e">>>"
}

Arranger : A Role-Puzzling Adventure follows the story of Jemma, a small-town misfit on a journey of self-discovery. Venturing out beyond her stiflingly cozy confines, she finds an inspiring world - but also one ruled by fear, and a strange, immovable 'static' force. Can she disrupt a culture of stagnation, and find a place to fit into it?

🆓 Epic免费游戏 🆓
📅 2026年5月11日
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
**当前免费领取游戏：**
1️⃣ Arranger: A Role-Puzzling Adventure - 原价：¥69 - 类型：解谜冒险 - 介绍：一款迷人的解谜冒险游戏，整个世界会随着你的移动而改变。重新排列路径，解决环境谜题，探索色彩斑斓的故事驱动世界，拥有独特的基于网格的移动机制。

2️⃣ Trash Goblin - 原价：¥55 - 类型：模拟经营 - 介绍：一款舒适的商店经营和修复游戏，你将清洁、修复并出售小饰品给顾客，同时定制你古怪的哥布林商店。

3️⃣ Teacup - 原价：¥35 - 类型：叙事冒险 - 介绍：一款温馨的叙事冒险游戏，跟随害羞的青蛙Teacup探索迷人的世界，收集制作茶会的食材。
